User.title: User
User.description: User profile document containing basic profile metadata

uid.description: The unique user ID matching request.auth.uid

stripeCustomerId.description: Stripe customer ID associated with the user

stripeSubscriptionId.description: Stripe subscription ID associated with the user

createdAt.description: The date and time the user was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time the user was last updated

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: A fully structured lesson generated or loaded in the Lyra application

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this lesson

summary.description: A brief outline of the lesson

slides.description: Array of Slide entities containing script, concept, and content

worksheet.description: Worksheet containing list of questions, options, and keys

quiz.description: Quiz questions for smartboard team play

/users/{userId}.description: User document containing basic profile metadata. Path variable userId must match the authenticated user UID.

/lessons/{lessonId}.description: Educational lessons generated or saved by educators. Path variable lessonId is a unique document ID.
